Creates Fly Brace from bottom chord of truss to Purlin and purlin cleat to the top chord. It also adds chamfer to the Plates welded to both top and bottom chords.
column3:
>Description:
This application makes it easy for you to create fly brace that connects the bottom chord of truss and purlins. It also adds the purlin cleat with chamfer to the top chord. It also indicates that the non-chamfer portion of plate to be welded to the primary member to It ensure that the hole aligns with the purlin during erection. Saves time and cost.
It can be used for both Z section and C Section. Additional option for overlap if the purlins are Z sections.
",Active,26/10/2023 4:27:38 PM

column1: 92,Unique Number,YES,UNIQUE_NUMBER,,,"Unique number to panels is commonly asked by the clients. To achieve that, we do it manually by opening the UDA of each panel and set the value. This application enables users to assign unique number to picked objects in the same order of sequence. Any change at the later stage can be done in User defined attribute",Active,13/11/2023 3:41:18 PM

column2: mso-style-textfill-fill-alpha:100.0%"">Purpose :  Assign unique numbers to user defined

column1: attribute in the sequence order to picked panels.
number to panels is commonly asked by the clients. To achieve that, we do it
manually by opening the UDA of each panel and set the value. This application
enables users to assign unique number to picked objects in the same order of
sequence. Any change at the later stage can be done in User defined attribute. Option to add number formats (01, 001, 0001) is also included. ",Active,29/08/2022 2:49:19 PM

94,Upstand Plate,,UPSTAND_PLATE,IBIM,IBIM-1059,"
Purpose : Creates Cap and Upstand plate between post and beam

Description:
Upstand Plate connection is quite common in Residential Projects. It is created to connect the timber beam with post but can also be used for PFC section. In-built function to change the near side and far side and extend the plates to connect two secondary beams. Hole is created on  the upstand plate only if it is timber. For PFC, option is given to change the hole to bolt.

",Active,29/08/2022 3:15:39 PM

95,Web Cut Custom Component,YES,WEB_CUT_CUSTOM_COMPONENT,,,Select all the web members to create a cut in the web for galvanization. Distance can be adjusted. Option to change the side ( Front / Back ) and Level(Top and Bottom).,Active,13/11/2023 3:41:18 PM

96,Weld Check And Weld Parts,YES,WELD_CHECK_AND_WELD_PARTS,,,"Adding a bolt or hole to a part is quite common in project. Currently, it is a manual process. With this tool, user can create bolt/hole to parts and set the distance by qty, max, exact, equal.",Active,13/11/2023 3:41:18 PM
